title: microcos crassifolia
intro: Microcos crassifolia, also known as the Yellow Bitterwood or Yellow Mangosteen, is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to exhibit potential in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Microcos crassifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Microcos crassifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional remedies and tonics.
